claims.claim: Gabe Kirk is a highly skilled grappler who consistently submits high-level training partners.
claims.quote: He's the only person I remember the last time I rolled with him. I think he submitted me three times and I didn't submit him once.

claims.claim: Tracy Cortez has been training at the Mexico Performance Institute for her upcoming fight.
claims.quote: Tracy has been in the Mexico PI and I retired. She's been down there.

claims.claim: The speaker's past MMA career was significantly hindered by a chronic hand injury.
claims.quote: it definitely would have been better than it was because you had one hand.

claims.claim: The speaker suffered from a long-term, undiagnosed medical condition that required regular infusions and caused severe illness.
claims.quote: you had to do interfuron like infusions every what month? ... I was sick every single time.

claims.claim: A fighter who has recently undergone brain surgery cannot perform effectively in a fight because their brain will naturally shut down to avoid serious injury.
claims.quote: Your brain is going to protect itself anyways. It's going to shut off to avoid that serious injury.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor will lose his upcoming fight because of the long layoff.
claims.quote: I'm kind of sad because it's been so long that I think he's going to get his ass beat.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor performed better against Khabib Nurmagomedov than Dustin Poirier or Justin Gaethje did.
claims.quote: Connor did well. He did a lot better than a lot of other people.

claims.claim: Alejandro Costa has good cardio.

claims.claim: Alejandro Costa has a good chin.
claims.quote: He's got a good chin.

claims.claim: Alejandro Costa lacks sufficient striking volume.
claims.quote: except for volume and process. Um, maybe I I think process I think you're being a little critical on him. I think volume absolutely.

claims.claim: Alejandro Costa has good cardio and a good chin.
claims.quote: his cardio is good. He's got a good chin.

claims.claim: Cody Durden is too wild and sloppy in his standing exchanges.
claims.quote: I think Deran is too wild standing. I think he's too sloppy standing.

claims.claim: Cody Durden's aggressive style opens him up to getting hit and hurt.
claims.quote: in doing so, he also opens himself up to get hit and hurt and everything else.

claims.claim: Alejandro Costa lacks volume in his striking.
claims.quote: I don't think he's got a lot of volume. I I I actually think his volume is is bad.

claims.claim: Alejandro Costa has a better chin than Cody Durden.
claims.quote: He's got a way better chin.

claims.claim: Zach Reese has one of the worst stances in the sport.
claims.quote: He's got one of the worst stances that I've seen ever.

claims.claim: Zach Reese's kicks are slow and telegraphed.
claims.quote: His kicks are slow and he doesn't like to punch... he he telegraphs him so much that he just gets hit.

claims.claim: Ryan Gandra has better cardio than Pereira.
claims.quote: I think he has way better cardio than Pereira.

claims.claim: Ryan Gandra's chin rises when he throws extended combinations.
claims.quote: when he starts throwing these extended combinations, chin comes up.

claims.claim: Zach Reese's chin has been suspect.
claims.quote: Reese's chin has been suspect a lot.

claims.claim: Gandra's chin rises when he throws extended combinations.
claims.quote: when he starts throwing these extended combinations, chin comes up.

claims.claim: Garza is too inexperienced for the current level of competition.
claims.quote: I think it's too big too soon.

claims.claim: Garza will be overwhelmed by the spotlight of the event.
claims.quote: He's going to be wideeyed. He's on a Connor card. He's going to see Connor at weigh-ins and be like, "Oh my, he's going to be starruck."

claims.claim: Fared Basherat has better striking defense than his brother.
claims.quote: Fared is he has much better defense than his brother for some reason.

claims.claim: Fared Basherat possesses one of the best single-leg high trips in MMA.

claims.claim: Fared Basherat is elite at mixing striking with wrestling.
claims.quote: Fared I would say is one of the best guys at mixing in his striking to his wrestling

claims.claim: Penas has never checked a leg kick in his career.
claims.quote: Penas has never checked a leg kick in his entire life.

claims.claim: Caesar Almeida is technically superior to Penas.
claims.quote: on a technical level he's going to be light years ahead of Pineas.

claims.claim: Caesar Almeida's chin has declined with age.
claims.quote: Caesar's old and he's not as good as he you as fresh as he used to be

claims.claim: Penas has not yet faced an opponent of Caesar Almeida's caliber.
claims.quote: he has not fought anybody who can fight back and who is as good as Cesar.

claims.claim: Penas has never checked a leg kick in his entire career.
claims.quote: Penas has never checked a leg kick in his entire life.

claims.claim: Caesar has no tell on his leg kicks.
claims.quote: Caesar's leg kicks are amazing and he has no tell on the leg kicks.

claims.claim: Penas is a forward pressure fighter who is susceptible to leg kicks when stepping in.
claims.quote: if we see Penas do what he's been doing lately, he's a forward pressure fighter and he's gonna eat that leg kick every time

claims.claim: Penas has a history of being backed up to the cage and hit with straight shots.
claims.quote: Penas was getting backed up onto the cage by some of these guys and he was getting straight shots landed on him.

claims.claim: Alhassen does not have a phenomenal chin and gets dropped in many fights.
claims.quote: Alhassen also has not been known to have this phenomenal chin either. He gets dropped in a lot of fight.

claims.claim: Luke Riley has poor takedown defense.
claims.quote: His wrestling defense is not great.

claims.claim: Kai Kamaka is a two-time state wrestling champion.
claims.quote: I believe he's actually a two-time state champ

claims.claim: Kai Kamaka rarely utilizes kicks or wrestling in his fights, relying primarily on boxing.
claims.quote: My my issue with Kai is he rarely kicks and he just boxes. Um, he doesn't wrestle a lot.

claims.claim: Kai Kamaka keeps his hands down while standing in range.
claims.quote: The biggest issue with Kai is Kai's hands are always down.

claims.claim: Kai Kamaka's training environment at Extreme Couture lacks proper coaching and relies on choreographed mitt work.
claims.quote: It's literally just hitting mits, choreograph mits. Hey, Kai, we're sending you a game plan after this.

claims.claim: Kai Kamaka is more well-rounded than Luke Riley with better takedowns and grappling.

claims.claim: Kai Kamaka consistently fights with his hands down while in range.
claims.quote: The biggest issue with Kai is Kai's hands are always down.

claims.claim: Luke Riley has a significantly weaker strength of schedule compared to Kai Kamaka.

claims.claim: Luke Riley's habit of bouncing is effective for influencing judges and intimidating opponents.
claims.quote: he does this bounce thing, right? He's always doing this like bounce thing. It it's like it's so good for the judges and it's honestly it's so intimidating

claims.quote: his takedown defense is great.

claims.quote: Whitaker is so smooth with his range management, picking him apart with the jab, doubling up on the hooks.

claims.claim: Nikita Krylov has poor footwork compared to Robert Whittaker.

claims.claim: Robert Whittaker's takedown defense is highly effective.
claims.quote: His takedown defense is great.

claims.claim: Terrence McKinney relies on opponents standing stationary to land his early-fight knockouts.
claims.quote: I noticed every time he does it's because these guys go stationary... He has to find these guys and track them down in one place.

claims.claim: Bobby Green uses superior lateral movement and feints to avoid being tracked down.
claims.quote: I think it's going to be very hard for Terrence to track him down because of his lateral movement, because of the way he's always pushing and pulling.

claims.claim: Bobby Green has a significant durability issue.
claims.quote: the chin is obviously a big issue

claims.claim: Terrence McKinney performs poorly when he is forced to take damage.
claims.quote: the second that he takes damage, he's kind of goes to fetal position. If he's not the hammer, he's the worst nail.

claims.claim: Bobby Green uses lateral movement and feints to control the pace and distance of a fight.
claims.quote: he'll get you thinking he's moving backwards and then he'll blitz in. And then other times when you think he's blitzing, he's fainting.

claims.claim: Bobby Green has a suspect chin.
claims.quote: the chin is obviously a big issue

claims.claim: Terrence McKinney reacts poorly to taking damage and tends to fold when pressured.
claims.quote: I think the the second that he takes damage, he's kind of goes to fetal position. If he's not the hammer, he's the worst nail.

claims.quote: Bobb's been grappling a lot more

claims.quote: he's got a little bit of a chin, a little button chin

claims.quote: he's a little small for the division.

claims.quote: He's got a little bit of a chin, a little button chin

claims.quote: his just fight IQ is not there. He's he's just wants to fight too much.

claims.claim: Looney is one of the most technical strikers in the division.
claims.quote: Looney is one of the more like one of the most technical guys in the division.

claims.claim: Looney struggles when opponents pressure him and force him to wrestle.

claims.claim: Mario Bautista's chain wrestling style is more difficult to defend than the power-double style of Merab Dvalishvili.

claims.claim: Mario Bautista will struggle to secure takedowns against Cory Sandhagen.
claims.quote: I think Mario's going to have a lot tougher time keeping and securing takedowns.

claims.quote: I don't have the same pop. I don't have that same athleticism.

claims.quote: He gets hurt a lot. Uh especially now later in his career, he looks like he's 90 years old.

claims.quote: I'm shocked the odds are the way. I thought they were going to be heavy for Max. You know, they've been closing in because of Mac's recent performance.

claims.claim: Max Holloway will win his upcoming fight inside the distance.
